autoSelectProfile.title: Auto-Select Profile
autoSelectProfile.description: Configure how Seanime automatically selects the best torrent.
autoSelectProfile.excludeTermsHelp: Torrents containing any of these terms will be excluded.
autoSelectProfile.minMaxSizeHelp: Minimum and maximum size in MB.
autoSelectProfile.multipleAudioTracksHelp: Prefer torrents with multiple audio tracks.
autoSelectProfile.multipleSubtitleTracksHelp: Prefer torrents with multiple subtitle tracks.
autoSelectProfile.requireLanguageMatchHelp: Reject if preferred language is not found
autoSelectProfile.requireCodecMatchHelp: Reject if preferred codec is not found
autoSelectProfile.requireSourceMatchHelp: Reject if preferred source is not found
autoSelectProfile.providersSelect: Select up to 3 providers in priority order
autoSelectProfile.preferredCodecsDescription: Ordered list of preferred codecs (comma-separated alternatives)
autoSelectProfile.preferredSourcesDescription: Ordered list of preferred sources (comma-separated alternatives)
autoSelectProfile.suggestSources: BDRip, BD RIP, BluRay, Blu-Ray, Blu Ray, BD

onlinestream.title: Online Streaming
onlinestream.enableHelp: Watch anime episodes from online sources.

manga.title: Manga
manga.enableHelp: Read manga series, download chapters, and track your progress.
manga.defaultProviderHelp: Provider selected by default when opening a new manga series.
manga.overwriteAllSourcesDialogDescription: This will overwrite the selected source of all manga series you have opened with the default provider. Are you sure you want to continue?
manga.previousSourceSelectionsRestored: Previous source selections have been restored.
manga.allSourceSelectionsOverwritten: All source selections have been overwritten.
manga.autoUpdateProgressHelp: If enabled, your progress will be updated automatically when you reach the end of a chapter.
manga.localProviderDescription: Read manga series from your local directory.
manga.localSourceDirectoryHelp: Directory where your manga is stored. This is only used by the local manga provider.

discord.title: Discord
discord.richPresenceDescription: Show what you're watching or reading on Discord.
discord.showAniListProfileButtonHelp: Show a button in your Discord activity that links to your AniList profile.

denshi.title: Denshi
denshi.minimizeToTrayOnCloseHelp: When enabled, closing the window will minimize the application to the system tray instead of quitting.
denshi.openInBackgroundHelp: When enabled, the application will start hidden. You can show it from the system tray.
denshi.openAtLaunchHelp: When enabled, the application will start automatically when you log in to your computer.
denshi.featureNotSupportedOnLinux: This feature is not supported on Linux.
denshi.settingsAutoSaved: Settings are saved automatically and applied after restart
